narrative:
Newton Twp B (precinct in Trumbull County) has 727 registered voters, with 54.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.3 percentage points.
